title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Puran Associates Private Limited
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated May 27, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹3.10 lakh (Rupees Three Lakh Ten Thousand only) on Puran Associates Private Limited (the company) for non-compliance with certain provisions of the RBI directions on ‘Asset Classification’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under Section 58G(1)(b) read with Section 58B(5)(aa) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934. The statutory inspection of th
